changelog.title: Validation-mode + market-as-strategy
changelog.summary: Each FanDuel market is now its own strategy. Paper opens up for under-sampled strategies. Day 1 launch.

Added: 🎯 Bet Builder tab — FanDuel-style parlay slip: search filter, smart suggestions (best edge \ anchor \ lottery), save\load slips to localStorage, mobile bottom-sheet drawer, 12-leg cap, ±$ stake step buttons.
🔥 Most Confident Plays Today panel on Today tab — top picks from scout cache ranked by risk-adjusted edge, with strategy attribution.
🎯 Target Strategies card on Strategies tab — source-of-truth list of every market the engine scores (synced from code, not Notion).

📊 Journal tab overhaul: Daily Brief auto-summary, Strategy Attribution sparklines, Insights Panel (auto-detected patterns: tier ROI, market ROI, streaks, edge buckets), CLV Tracker scatter, Quick Reflection template composer.
Form Leaders dropdown now lists all 18 strategies (team-level shows explanatory state).
📣 OS-Updates tab (this one!) — release notes following keepachangelog.com format.
Bot personality: cautious-bettor flavor lines rotated daily in lock summaries via lib\v2_telegram_voice.py.
BvP factor wired into combined_factor — career batter-vs-pitcher history influences scoring stack.
Changed: Market = Strategy refactor: every FanDuel market is its own strategy (was 12 grouped names, now 18 individual). Pick attribution per-market so you can tell which is printing.
Validation-mode paper: daily cap 20u → 30u, WATCH tier opens for paper at 0.25× Kelly. LIVE unchanged (still WATCH-blocked, still 5u cap).
FanDuel line lock re-score: picks re-score against verified FD price at lock if the line moved since scout (no more stale-line bets).
NRFI v2 model: weighted blend (pitcher 0.65 \ offense 0.35), Bayesian shrinkage toward 0.73 prior, park-runs + temp + umpire-K modifiers.
Today tab simplified: removed factor chips (park \ NRFI prob \ hot batters). Now just slate + most confident plays.
Form (L10) → Form Leaders. Added stale-data fallback (uses most recent v2_form_*.json when today's hasn't fired yet).
Dashboard cosmetic refresh: Inter font, JetBrains Mono for code, amber accent palette, polished cards with hover-lift, mobile horizontal-scroll tabs.
Bet Builder moved to tab position 2 (right after Today).
Notion Strategy DB synced to engine: 8 archived, 15 created.
Fixed: Telegram bot wasn't replying to operator DMs (DM allow-list bug). Added TELEGRAM_OPERATOR_USER_IDS env var + \whoami \ping public commands.
GitHub Pages auto-deploy stuck in workflow mode (build_type=workflow). Switched to legacy 'Deploy from a branch' — auto-publishes on every commit, ~60s propagation.
NRFI ranking discrepancy: Top NRFI panel hid thin-sample games, Games to Watch didn't. Now consistent, with ⚠ thin \ ⚠ prior-only badges.
Form tab empty when today's form-discovery hadn't fired. Now falls back to most recent file with stale-day badge.
5 .bat files had Unix LF line endings — normalized to CRLF (caught by health-check).
Removed: Telegram Bot dedicated tab (replaced by this OS-Updates tab; bot status moved to Settings).
Top NRFI Plays standalone section on Today tab (consolidated into Most Confident Plays).
How picks are scored decoder card from Today tab (moved to per-row tooltips).
